# Codebase Summary

- Project: storefront-app
- Languages: typescript
- Frameworks: nextjs, react, prisma
- Companions: nextjs-typescript-postgres
- Verification packs: nextjs-baseline
- Package managers: npm
- Next actions: Confirm the first active work slice before editing., Run the nearest verification command before large changes., Verify lint, typecheck, test, and build before large Next.js changes., Confirm schema ownership before editing database access paths.
